recent_events_footnote: Source: Taiwan Ministry of National Defense daily report. Aircraft = PLA aircraft detected in Taiwan ADIZ; Vessels = PLA naval vessels detected near Taiwan.

map.transponder_note: Transponders usually off; see MND data for counts

methodology_overview: The Threat Index is a composite score (0–100) combining military activity signals from Taiwan's Ministry of National Defense with NLP-based news analysis. It uses statistical anomaly detection against a 30-day rolling baseline.
methodology_aircraft: Standard deviation from 30-day mean. ≤1σ = 0, linear 1σ–3σ, capped at 25
methodology_centerline: Crossings / total aircraft ratio. 0% = 0, linear scale, ≥50% = 20
methodology_vessels: Same σ-based anomaly as aircraft, against 30-day mean
methodology_news: Tiered keyword matching: low (2–5), medium (8–12), high (15–20). 24h decay half-life
methodology_source: Data sources: Taiwan MND daily reports (radar), OpenSky Network (ADS-B), news RSS feeds. Methodology inspired by Caldara-Iacoviello GPR Index.
